reference: Hi, I have been unwell since last week with sinusitis. I still have it and do not seem to be getting any better. I also have a cough and my back feels like it has been kicked in. Can you offer any advice? I am taking regular paracetamol and non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs as I am having a lot of headaches, etc.
text: Hi, I have been unwell since last week with sinusitis, I still have it and do not seem to be getting any better, I also have a cough and my back feels like it has been kicked in for any advice, I am taking regular paracetamol and non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs as I am having a lot of headaches etc.
